title: Milan, Lombardy — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Milan, Lombardy: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Milan is a city in Lombardy with a population of 1,396,000. Italy’s fashion and financial capital, a global hub for design, business, and culture with the iconic Duomo and world-class shopping.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
